scripts.docker:prod-init: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml build --build-arg NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE=http://localhost:3001 && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml up
scripts.docker:prod: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml pull && docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d
